vocab.example: To counteract a sedentary lifestyle, I make a conscious effort to stand up and stretch every hour while working.

vocab.meaning: phương pháp toàn diện (tác động lên cả thân và tâm)
vocab.example: I adopt a holistic approach to health, focusing not just on physical gym sessions but also on my mental well-being.

vocab.meaning: sự thiếu hụt về dinh dưỡng
vocab.example: I consult a nutritionist annually to ensure that my plant-based diet doesn't lead to any nutritional deficiencies.
Long-distance running is my preferred method for enhancing my cardiovascular endurance and overall lung capacity.
Drinking an adequate amount of water daily is the simplest yet most effective way to help the kidneys detoxify the body.
I’ve been experimenting with intermittent fasting, which has noticeably improved my energy levels and digestion.

vocab.meaning: sự dẻo dai và khả năng vận động linh hoạt
vocab.example: Practicing Pilates regularly is essential for maintaining flexibility and mobility as I get older.

vocab.meaning: kiệt sức về mặt tinh thần
vocab.example: I view weekend hiking trips as a vital escape to prevent mental burnout from my high-pressure job.
I try to center my meals around lean protein and leafy greens to support muscle recovery after a workout.
Listening to ambient music before bed has a wonderful sedative effect that helps me fall asleep almost instantly.
